EmailTemplate.name: Charge Off Notification
EmailTemplate.subject: Assignment to Collection Agency
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
P.O. Box 53 | Station B | London | Ontario | N6A 4V3
{!CASE(MONTH(TODAY()),1, "January",2, "February",3, "March", 4, "April", 5, "May", 6,"June",7, "July",8, "August",9, "September",10, "October",11, "November",12, "December","None")} {!TEXT(DAY(TODAY()))}, {!TEXT(YEAR(TODAY()))}
{!Product__c.First_Name__c} {!Product__c.Last_Name__c}
{!Product__c.Address_Line1__c}, {!Product__c.Address_Line2__c}
{!Product__c.City__c}, {!Product__c.State__c}.
{!Product__c.Zip_Code__c}
Sir / Madam:
RE: {!Account.Name}:
Balance Due: $
Assignment to Collection Agency
As you have failed to respond to numerous attempts to contact you, we will be assigning your account to a collection agency and reported on your credit file as an R9.
If you would like to settle this matter prior to it being sent to an agency, then you will need to call us today at 1.855.266.3131.
Regards,
Affirm Financial
1.855.266.3131
